features.description: Listing Grep/Glob in --tools now enables dedicated search tools on native builds; previously silently ignored.
features.reference_changelog_line: `--tools`: explicitly listing Grep/Glob now provides the dedicated search tools on native builds with embedded search (previously these names were silently ignored)

features.description: Clicking a slash command in autocomplete now fills the prompt instead of running it; Enter required to execute.
features.reference_changelog_line: Clicking a slash command in the autocomplete menu now fills it into your prompt instead of running it immediately; press Enter to run

features.description: Explicit WebFetch(domain:...) deny/ask/allow rules now override built-in preapproved-host auto-allow.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed WebFetch permission rules not being applied to built-in preapproved domains; explicit `WebFetch(domain:...)` deny/ask/allow rules now take precedence over the preapproved-host auto-allow

features.description: Read deny rules now hide files from Glob/Grep results, and Windows backslash/case-variant paths match correctly.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed Windows permission rules never matching when spelled with backslashes (`~\`, `\\server\share`) or case-variant paths, and Read deny rules not hiding files from Glob/Grep results

features.description: `claude agents --json` output now includes a `waitingFor` field describing what a waiting session is blocked on.
features.reference_changelog_line: `claude agents --json` now includes `waitingFor` showing what a waiting session is blocked on (e.g. permission prompt)

features.description: `/effort` now confirms when the chosen level will persist as the default for new sessions.
features.reference_changelog_line: `/effort` now confirms when your chosen level will persist as the default for new sessions
